A little something for your Banff weekend

Happy Birthday,
Ryleigh

painting your keepsake…

 

 

Painted in your browser with 🦀 Rust & WebAssembly · refresh for a different Alberta wonder
photos: public domain / CC0 (Wikimedia Commons) · made just for you

This gift needs to be opened from a web address (not a file on disk). It's already live — just open the link, or see the README to host it.
